name: github-trending-monitor
description: GitHub Trending自动吸收系统 - 五行团队技术雷达

scripts.analyze: node -e "const monitor = require('./index.js'); monitor.runFullAnalysis().then(r => console.log('分析完成')).catch(e => console.error('分析失败:', e))"
scripts.report: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const reportsDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'reports', 'github-trending'); const files = fs.readdirSync(reportsDir).filter(f => f.endsWith('.json')).sort().reverse(); if (files.length > 0) { const latest = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(reportsDir, files[0]), 'utf8')); console.log('最新报告:', JSON.stringify(latest.recommendations, null, 2)); } else { console.log('暂无报告'); }"

author: 万能虾CEO
